user.title: Powerline Network
user.description:
Click 'Submit' to scan for Powerline adapters on your network.

Requires raw socket access (CAP_NET_RAW).

Supports: TP-Link, FRITZ!Powerline, devolo, and other HomePlug AV adapters.

confirm.title: Devices Found

error.no_devices_found: No Powerline adapters found. Check that adapters are plugged in, paired, and connected via Ethernet cable. Home Assistant needs CAP_NET_RAW.
error.no_interface: No suitable network interface found. Make sure an Ethernet cable is connected.

abort.already_configured: This Powerline network is already configured.
abort.raw_socket_unavailable:
Raw socket access not available. Home Assistant needs CAP_NET_RAW capability.

For Docker: use --cap-add=NET_RAW --network=host
For HAOS: install as add-on with host network
For venv: sudo setcap cap_net_raw+ep $(readlink -f $(which python3))

init.title: Powerline Network Options
init.description: Adjust polling behavior. Changes take effect immediately.
